name: Encrypted Text
summary: A cyberpunk-inspired text effect that simulates decryption by rapidly cycling through random characters before revealing the final text, creating a high-tech, mysterious visual moment.
detailedDescription: The Encrypted Text component creates a captivating decryption effect inspired by cyberpunk and hacker aesthetics. When triggered (on page load, scroll into view, or hover), the text initially appears as rapidly cycling random characters - numbers, symbols, and letters - that gradually resolve into the final readable text. This creates a moment of mystery and revelation that feels like watching data decrypt in real-time. The effect uses character scrambling algorithms that progressively lock in correct characters from left to right or based on configurable patterns. Animation speed, scramble intensity, and trigger conditions are all customizable. The visual effect evokes themes of technology, security, data, and digital transformation. Perfect for tech product launches, cybersecurity contexts, data-focused brands, or any design wanting to convey cutting-edge technology and digital sophistication. The effect creates memorable micro-interactions that users notice and appreciate, adding personality and thematic reinforcement to technical content.
purpose: Convey themes of technology, security, and digital transformation
Generate memorable reveal moments through character scrambling
Support tech-focused and cybersecurity brand identities
Add mysterious, high-tech personality to text content
behavior: Displays random scrambling characters before revealing final text
Progressively locks in correct characters during decryption
Triggers on page load, scroll into view, or hover interaction
Animates character cycling at configurable speeds
Supports various scramble patterns and reveal sequences
Maintains text accessibility with semantic HTML structure
Returns to scrambled state on re-trigger if configured
visualCharacteristics: Rapidly cycling random characters creating scramble effect
Progressive reveal building anticipation and interest
Digital, data-driven appearance suitable for tech contexts
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
